name: fix-ruby-version-mismatch
description: Fix Git commands mixing Ruby 3.1/3.2 binaries causing path confusion
error: Commands running with wrong Ruby version (3.1 vs 3.2) causing kernel_require or gem loading errors
solution: Always use explicit full paths: C:\Ruby31-x64\bin\ruby.exe and C:\Ruby31-x64\bin\bundle
when_to_use:
When you see mixed Ruby version usage, git commands fail with path issues,
or bundle exec uses wrong ruby binary (3.2 instead of 3.1)
